changes: referral settings and the official admin invite code are saved through the protected server endpoint
new-user and referrer rewards use the linked financial account instead of a zero-balance authentication mirror
referral apply returns the updated real/bonus balance immediately to the user interface
ticket reward type mismatch is repaired and free tickets update the field used by the app
the default restored new-user referral bonus is 1 USD bonus and remains fully admin-configurable
